title: SQL: Data lost when restart
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(a INTEGER, b VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE x(a INTEGER, c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO x (a, c) VALUES (1, 1.5), (2, NULL);
UPDATE t SET a = NULL WHERE b = 'test';
key_bug_features: Data loss on table update after restart
